name: numeric-gt
description: gt modifier yields a numeric compare. A plain integer value (no modifier) would be COMPARE_OP_EQ. Note sint64 is encoded as a JSON string in proto3 JSON.
input_yaml:
title: Numeric greater-than
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID|gt: 4000
  condition: selection
